mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo, order_no, item_no, split_item_no, full_order_no, model_no, quantity, price, currency, ship_date, ship_method, case_no, barcode, en_name, weight, supplier_code, create_time, update_time, order_type, remark, remarkII, status, product_code, roHS_code, origin, from_code, shelf_code, update_user, create_user, imp_order_no, oversea_invoice_no, imp_model_no, exp_msg, sn_code
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_pack_temp
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_pack_temp (id, invoice_id, invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo, order_no, item_no, split_item_no, full_order_no, model_no, quantity, price, currency, ship_date, ship_method, case_no, barcode, en_name, weight, supplier_code, create_time, update_time, order_type, remark, remarkII, status, product_code, roHS_code, origin, from_code, shelf_code, update_user, create_user, imp_order_no, oversea_invoice_no, imp_model_no, exp_msg, sn_code) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fullOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{shipMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caseNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{remarkii,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rohsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{shelfCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{impModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expMsg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

update dbo.Imp_invoice_detail_pack_temp
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

currency = #{record.currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

ship_method = #{record.shipMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

en_name = #{record.enName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remarkII = #{record.remarkii,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

sn_code = #{record.snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

ship_method = #{shipMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

barcode = #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
en_name = #{enName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remarkII = #{remarkii,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},

roHS_code = #{rohsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
origin = #{origin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_order_no = #{impOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
oversea_invoice_no = #{overseaInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
imp_model_no = #{impModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_msg = #{expMsg,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
sn_code = #{snCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
